hooks.command: bash -c 'DSP_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .); CLI=""; for p in .cursor .claude .codex; do if [ -f "$DSP_ROOT/$p/skills/data-structure-protocol/scripts/dsp-cli.py" ]; then CLI="python $DSP_ROOT/$p/skills/data-structure-protocol/scripts/dsp-cli.py"; break; fi; done; if [ -n "$CLI" ] && [ -d "$DSP_ROOT/.dsp" ]; then $CLI --root "$DSP_ROOT" get-stats 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
